content: After fixing any bug in this project, you must update the local installation so the running daemon reflects the fix. Rebuild the frontend if it changed (cd frontend && npm run build), then run `uv run memory-mcp-setup` to reinstall the runtime/UI and reload the launchd daemon, and verify the daemon is healthy. A bug fix is not considered complete until the local installation has been updated.
summary: After fixing any bug in this project, you must update the local installation so the running daemon reflects the fix
title: Update the local installation after every bug fix
